steps.title: Track the two institutions
steps.content: The first part describes the Centro de Arte Latinoamericano, including when it was founded and what it collects. The phrase “More recently founded” then introduces another US-based institution, the Hispanic Arts Center, with its own location and cultural focus.

steps.title: Match the sequence
steps.content: Choice A invents expansion plans. Choice B invents a rejected trend. Choice C invents a definition and a social argument. The structure is simply one cultural institution followed by a more recently founded one. The answer is D.
